jobs.title: Expression of Interest - International School of Ticino
jobs.description:
## Descrizione
Inspired Education is the leading global group of premium schools, with a portfolio of 121 premium private schools spanning 6 continents which utilise proven educational practices from every corner of the globe, ensuring over 95,000 students receive a world-class learning experience from Kindergarten to Year 13.

The International School of Ticino (IST) is part of the Inspired Education Group, one of the world's leading premium school groups. Located in Lugano, IST offers a stimulating international learning environment in Ticino.

descriptionByLocale.en: Descrizione Inspired Education is the leading global group of premium schools, with a portfolio of 121 premium private schools spanning 6 continents which utilise proven educational practices from every corner of the globe, ensuring over 95,000 students receive a world-class learning experience from Kindergarten to Year 13. The International School of Ticino (IST) is part of the Inspired Education Group, one of the world's leading premium school groups. Located in Lugano, IST offers a stimulating international learning environment in Ticino.
descriptionByLocale.it: Descrizione Inspired Education è il principale gruppo globale di scuole premium, con una portafoglio di 121 scuole private premium su 6 continenti che utilizzano pratiche educative dimostrate da ogni angolo del globo, garantendo che oltre 95.000 studenti ricevano un'esperienza di apprendimento di classe mondiale dalla Scuola dell'Infanzia all'Anno 13. La Scuola Internazionale del Ticino (IST) fa parte del gruppo Inspired Education, uno dei principali gruppi di scuole premium al mondo. Situata a Lugano, l'IST offre un stimolante ambiente di apprendimento internazionale nel Ticino.
descriptionByLocale.de: Beschreibung Inspired Education ist die führende globale Gruppe von Premium-Schulen, mit einem Portfolio von 121 Premium-Privatschulen auf 6 Kontinenten, die bewährte Bildungsmethoden aus allen Ecken der Welt nutzen, um sicherzustellen, dass über 95.000 Schüler von der Kindertagesstätte bis zur 13. Klasse eine Weltklasse-Lernumgebung erhalten. Die Internationale Schule des Tessin (IST) ist Teil der Inspired Education Group, einer der führenden Premium-Schulgruppen der Welt. Sie befindet sich in Lugano und bietet eine anregende internationale Lernumgebung im Tessin.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Description Inspired Education est le principal groupe mondial d'écoles premium, avec un portefeuille de 121 écoles privées premium sur 6 continents qui utilisent des pratiques éducatives éprouvées de tous les coins du globe, garantissant que plus de 95 000 élèves reçoivent une expérience d'apprentissage de classe mondiale de la maternelle à la 13e année. L'École Internationale du Tessin (IST) fait partie du groupe Inspired Education, l'un des principaux groupes d'écoles premium au monde. Située à Lugano, l'IST offre un environnement d'apprentissage international stimulant dans le Tessin.

it: Capacità di adattarsi a un ambiente internazionale
Abilità di pianificazione e gestione del curriculum
Motivazione per insegnare in un contesto internazionale
de: Fähigkeit, sich an eine internationale Umgebung anzupassen
Motivation, in einem internationalen Kontext zu unterrichten
fr: Capacité à s'adapter à un environnement international
Compétences en planification et gestion du programme
Motivation pour enseigner dans un contexte international
